exportIpToCsvTitle: Export my IP addresses to a CSV file
exportIpToCsvExplanation: The export of your IPs takes a few seconds (depending on the number of IPs you have).
exportIpToCsvConfirm: Are you sure you want to export the IPs in CSV format?
exportIpToCsvSuccess: The export of your IPs is complete.
exportIpToCsvError: An error occurred during the export.
exportIpToCsvDownloadingFile: The file is being created, please wait
